<!--
  This lightweight template helps avoid recurring questions and speeds up diagnosis.
  You are free to ignore it, but filling it correctly helps a lot. Thanks for reporting.
  A checked checkbox looks like this: [x]
-->


## Technical information
**Using version:**
 - [ ] `master` (running from source)
 - [ ] bundled in a Damascus OS ISO (specify version)
 - [ ] other (specify)

**Running on:**
 - [ ] Damascus OS (live ISO)
 - [ ] Other Linux (specify distro)

**How comfortable you are with your system and/or IT in general:**
 - [ ] I'm kind of lost, honestly
 - [ ] I know what's up, I could help you run some commands or checks
 - [ ] My machine is fully under my control, tell me what you need

---

## Problem

(Write your report here. Screenshots and step-by-step instructions can help a lot!)
